use_codes.desc: TREATMENT AND PREVENTION OF OSTEOPOROSIS IN POSTMENOPAUSAL WOMEN

indications.text:
BONIVA Injection is indicated for the treatment of osteoporosis in postmenopausal
women.
In postmenopausal women with osteoporosis, BONIVA increases BMD and reduces the
incidence of vertebral fractures (see CLINICAL PHARMACOLOGY: Clinical
Studies). Osteoporosis may be confirmed by the presence or hi...

1.1 Treatment of Postmenopausal Osteoporosis
BONIVA Injection is indicated for the treatment of osteoporosis in postmenopausal women. In postmenopausal
women with osteoporosis, BONIVA increases bone mineral density (BMD) and reduces the incidence of
vertebral fractures [see Clinical Studies (14)].
